title: PR #448 R1 — Mixed (Qodo+Gemini+SonarCloud)
learnings: grep patterns must not match success messages
migration scripts must fail loudly on missing source
use Date.parse not string comparison for timestamps
semgrep pattern-not-inside with $X.map suppresses unrelated $ARR[0]

title: PR #448 R2 — Mixed (CI+Qodo+SonarCloud)
learnings: eslint-disable-next-line only covers one line

passthrough entries change test expectations

title: PR #448 R3 — Mixed (Qodo+SonarCloud)
learnings: DOMPurify ALLOWED_TAGS:[] preserves script body — use FORBID_CONTENTS

path traversal guards at every entry point

replaceAll propagation to test assertions
